description: Revert enums to derived Serialize: performance degraded 2.1% (199.84 → 204.09 ns). Manual impls may be faster due to specialized string handling.

asi.change: Reverted MessageKind and OperationType to derived Serialize (removed manual impls)
asi.implication: Manual impls are likely faster for these simple enums; keep them

description: Test: change #[repr(u8)] and #[inline] -> both regressed performance. Reverted to baseline state (manual impl with #[inline(always)]).

asi.change: Tried adding #[repr(u8)] and changed #[inline] to #[inline]; both degraded performance
asi.notes: Within noise; reverted to known good state
